text: Server and issuers' Access Control Server software must support the updated 3-D Secure 2.0 specifications Merchant 3-D Secure Server providers will manage initiation of authentication requests according to the 3-D Secure version(s) supported by the issuer The implementation guide for merchants and acquirers This guide includes 3-D Secure 2.0 processing flows, how to get started, programme rules, and more. Visa clients with an existing Visa Online account: Click here If you do not have a Visa Online account, speak to your acquirer or your Visa account executive Vendor list and documentation For an approved list of 3-D Secure vendors and documentation to become compliant, please refer to the technology partners site. Visit now To learn more about 3-D Secure 2.0, contact your Visa account executive or your acquirer
